tool_use_result.originalFile:
Drag the probe to score each candidate. Drag c1's handle to change its length.

{#each candidateData as c (c.name)}
{c.score.toFixed(1)} {c.name}
{/each}

lines: // Pushed well clear of the 44px handle hit box (radial + tangential
// combined) so the label never sits under the probe dot or its focus
-    // ring at any angle, including when the probe lands exactly on a
+    // ring at any angle. The radial reach is deliberately well beyond any
+    // candidate label's radius (even c1 stretched to its own labels'
+    // range) and the tangential kick is large enough that even when the
+    // probe sits exactly on top of a candidate's line (e.g. 70 degrees on
+    // c2), the two label centers land 40+ px apart, never abutting.

content.text: DONE Increased the probe label's radial and tangential offset (R+56 with a 38-unit perpendicular kick, up from R+48/26) in DotAlignment.svelte so the "probe" label clears the candidate tip labels by 40+ px even when the probe angle exactly matches a candidate's angle (e.g. 70 degrees on c2), fixing the merged "c2probe" collision seen at length-cheat/1280.

result: DONE Increased the probe label's radial and tangential offset (R+56 with a 38-unit perpendicular kick, up from R+48/26) in DotAlignment.svelte so the "probe" label clears the candidate tip labels by 40+ px even when the probe angle exactly matches a candidate's angle (e.g. 70 degrees on c2), fixing the merged "c2probe" collision seen at length-cheat/1280.
